calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Ofmotion And Moiton To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian C. Johnson, Esq., of the Chanler Group, Tel. 510.848.8880, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement is in compliance with Health and Safety Code section 25249.7. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
